column1: # COA overrides: verified per-school per-program Cost of Attendance (2025-26 published figures)
# Source: each school's financial aid / student budget page
# Re-run `npm run import-ipeds` after editing this file.
# NYU School of Medicine (now Grossman) is tuition-free for all MD students;
# COA is living expenses only — $40k is a conservative all-in estimate.
